description: Style Note tonga gives the trend for glitter a stylish twist with this one shoulder dress. Its blended fabric composition and knit structure makes the dress cling ever so slightly to your body, giving you a flattering silhouette. Pair it with shiny stilettos and long earrings to take any party by storm. Product Details Black one shoulder sheath knit dress with electric blue and black fold-over at neck, comes with a shiny fabric belt Material and Care 98% Polyester 2% Spandex Machine wash cold Do not bleach Size and Fit Slim fit The model( height 5'8" and chest33") is wearing a size M
